evaluations.prompt: I've referenced the authentication architecture in the last 3 sessions. Should I remember it?
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent applies the promotion rule (referenced in 3+ consecutive sessions) and recommends promoting to hot cache. It identifies the correct hot cache slot (likely the snapshot file) and proposes the exact content to add.

evaluations.prompt: We just merged the payment integration spec. Remove it from hot cache.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent applies the demotion rule (spec completed and merged) and moves the entry from the snapshot/boot digest to deep storage in the design_docs_dir. It does NOT delete the knowledge — only relocates it.

evaluations.prompt: Starting a new session, load my project context.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent loads hot cache files in the correct order: (1) primer, (2) boot digest, (3) boot contract, (4) snapshot. Reports if any file is missing or stale. Does NOT skip the integrity check.

evaluations.prompt: What was decided about the database schema in last month's architecture review?
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent checks hot cache, then deep storage under design_docs_dir, then semantic cache. If not found after all tiers, reports 'not found in memory system' and asks the user to provide the information so it can be stored.
